childElements.name: TextBlock2
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "TextBlock2", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "

Complaint %publicComplaintName% with the subject %NewComplaint:ComplaintDetails:Subject% has been created.

", "textKey" : "" }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataType" : "Boolean", "dateFormat" : "MM-dd-yyyy", "disOnTplt" : false, "expression" : "CONTAINS(%Type%,'Allegation1Type')", "hide" : true, "hideGroupSep" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "label" : "isAllegation1", "mask" : null, "show" : null, "showInputWidth" : false }

childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 12, "controllingField" : { "element" : "", "source" : "", "type" : "" }, "defaultValue" : "false", "disOnTplt" : false, "enableCaption" : true, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "hide" : false, "horizontalMode" : true, "imageCountInRow" : 3, "label" : "Reporter Confidential", "optionHeight" : 100, "optionSource" : { "source" : "", "type" : "" }, "optionWidth" : 100, "options" : [ { "autoAdv" : null, "developerName" : null, "name" : "true", "value" : "Yes" }, { "autoAdv" : null, "developerName" : null, "name" : "false", "value" : "No" } ], "readOnly" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "required" : false, "show" : null }

childElements.name: RunningNotes
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "accessibleInFutureSteps" : false, "autocomplete" : null, "conditionType" : "Hide if False", "controlWidth" : 6, "debounceValue" : 0, "defaultValue" : null, "disOnTplt" : false, "help" : false, "helpText" : "", "helpTextPos" : "", "hide" : false, "inputWidth" : 12, "label" : "Running Notes", "maxLength" : 4000, "minLength" : 0, "pattern" : "", "placeholder" : "", "ptrnErrText" : "", "readOnly" : false, "repeat" : false, "repeatClone" : false, "repeatLimit" : null, "required" : false, "show" : null, "showInputWidth" : false }

childElements.name: SetValues1
childElements.propertySetConfig: { "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 2, "elementValueMap" : { "AddAdditionalDetails" : true, "Allegation" : { "SubType" : "Allegation2StubType2", "Type" : "Allegation1Type", "concatTypeSubType" : "Allegation1TypeAllegation2StubType2" }, "ComplaintDetails" : { "IncidentDetails" : { "IncidentDate" : "2025-02-14", "LocationOfIncident" : "Fountain Drive" }, "Priority" : "Low", "Reporter" : { "Email" : "eric@mailinator.com", "FirstName" : "Eric", "LastName" : "Cirellii", "Phone" : "9788576189", "ReporterAddress" : "1779 Fountain Dr, \nReston, VA 20190", "ReporterOrganization" : null }, "Status" : "Submitted", "Subject" : "Need for stable employment to help keep him on track" }, "IsRunningNotesAdded" : true, "Participants" : { "HasParticipants" : false, "firstName" : "Paul", "lastName" : "Marshall" }, "ReporterCategory" : "Social Worker", "RequestConfidentiality" : "false", "RunningNotes" : "Paul Marshall is receiving additional services through ACME Partners for permanent housing and custody support. One of their case managers reported that he is concerned that he will lose his current employment due to barriers of transportation and schedule conflicts with his children's schooling. ACME Partners knows that this could be a major setback for him and would like to proactively support him with finding more flexible employment or ensure we provide additional benefits such as transportation or childcare support.", "isAllegation1" : false, "isAllegation2" : false, "isAllegation3" : false }, "label" : "+++", "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "wpm" : false }

childElements.name: SetValues2
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 1, "elementValueMap" : { "AddAdditionalDetails" : true, "Allegation" : { "SubType" : "Allegation2StubType2", "Type" : "Allegation1Type", "concatTypeSubType" : "Allegation1TypeAllegation2StubType2" }, "ComplaintDetails" : { "IncidentDetails" : { "Comments" : "Speeding and swerving", "Description" : "Steve Marshall", "IncidentDate" : "2022-09-14", "LocationOfIncident" : "Fountain Drive" }, "Priority" : "Low", "Reporter" : { "Email" : "eric@mailinator.com", "FirstName" : "Eric", "LastName" : "Cirellii", "Phone" : "9788576189", "ReporterAddress" : "1779 Fountain Dr, 
Reston, VA 20190", "ReporterOrganization" : null }, "Status" : "Submitted", "Subject" : "Erratic Driving" }, "IsRunningNotesAdded" : true, "Participants" : { "HasParticipants" : false, "firstName" : "Steve", "lastName" : "Marshall" }, "ReporterCategory" : "Neighbor", "RequestConfidentiality" : "false", "RunningNotes" : "Steve Marshall was observed driving erratically in the neighborhood. He was seen speeding as well as swerving as he was driving down the street.

Steve's son is Paul Tatum and works downtown. Paul work requires him to travel frequently, both domestically, and infrequently, internationally.

Steve's wife recently passed away and since this happened, Steve has not gotten out much in the neighborhood.

Steve used to walk daily with his wife and they would often stop and visit with neighbors while on their walks. Steve has not been very active since his wife passed.

Steve is well liked by his neighbors and they are concerned about him and would very much like to see him get back to his normal routine and walking in the neighborhood rather than self isolating."", "isAllegation1" : true, "isAllegation2" : false, "isAllegation3" : false }, "label" : ">>", "message" : { }, "pubsub" : false, "show" : null, "showPersistentComponent" : [ true, false ], "ssm" : false, "wpm" : false }

childElements.name: TextBlock1
childElements.propertySetConfig:
{ "HTMLTemplateId" : "", "controlWidth" : 12, "dataJSON" : false, "label" : "TextBlock1", "sanitize" : false, "show" : null, "text" : "

Information to be given to every reporter on how their information will be used. Inform in case call is being recorded. Ask permission regarding confidentiality.

", "textKey" : "" }
